quotes.quote: Stop pretending that you can always multitask
Take LapTop out. Make it portable
Sweep stale storage keys in local/sync.
Take care if your eyes , look at objects far away and near..
Design your future, one FreeCAD sketch daily. ✅
Break the habits, that dont align with your goals
Build the habits, that align with your goals
